modDesc.author: JM / SebFS / Cédric C / Ronan LAR TP | FS25 Convert by B.O.B (github.com/eusouanderson)

description.en:
Renault K480 6x4 Meilleur Kipper - Dump Truck
Original mod for FS22 by JM / SebFS / Cédric C / Ronan LAR TP. Converted to FS25 by B.O.B.
Specifications: - Price: $130,000 - Power: 480 HP (500 HP motor) - Max Speed: 90 km/h - Mass: 7,250 kg - Transmission: 8 forward / 4 reverse gears - Drivetrain: 6x4 (tandem rear axles) - Fuel tank: 400L diesel / 60L DEF - Air tank: 4,000L - Load capacity: 20,000L bulk - Tires: Trelleborg - Configurable chassis color and body color - Tipping: Back, Right, Left - Interactive controls: Ladder, side doors, anti-roll bar - Tension belts included - Hook lift trailer compatible - Onboard air brake system
